robots.name: Free Book Library
robots.description: 50 classic public domain books. Search, filter by genre, save to reading list.

robots.name: EPUB Reader
robots.description: Upload and read .epub files. Chapter navigation, reading settings, bookmarks.

robots.name: Audiobook Player
robots.description: Text-to-speech reader. Paste text or upload files. Voice, speed, sleep timer.

robots.name: Book Writing Studio
robots.description: Chapter-based editor with rich text, word count, auto-save, and export.

robots.name: Book Outline Planner
robots.description: Three-act structure, drag-and-drop scenes, character tracker, timeline view.

robots.name: Book Cover Designer
robots.description: Design covers with templates, fonts, backgrounds. Download PNG or SVG.

robots.name: Writing Sprint Timer
robots.description: Timed writing sessions. WPM tracking, streaks, motivational quotes.

robots.name: ISBN & Book Metadata
robots.description: Look up books by ISBN, validate, convert ISBN-10/13, export citations.

robots.name: Manuscript Formatter
robots.description: Format text to industry standard. Double-spaced, proper headers, page count.

robots.name: Beta Reader Feedback
robots.description: Create feedback forms for beta readers. Collect and summarize responses.

robots.name: Book Blurb Generator
robots.description: Generate book blurbs from genre, character, conflict. Template + AI modes.

robots.name: Reading Tracker
robots.description: Track books, log pages, set goals, view charts. All stored locally.
